action.reasoning: Observation: ExpRate 7.17% on test, 10.34% on val. Loss still decreasing at 1.47. Training ~2min/epoch. Analysis: GRU decoder with coverage attention is limited. Transformer decoder should be much better. Decision: Rewrite with Transformer decoder, train from scratch with better hyperparameters. ~30 epochs should take ~60 min.
